title: Creation Log question
excerpt:
Hello All 
When a Monday.com Form is been used to submit data into a board, for some reason … I am assigned as Creator … Also If the Form includes notes I the Update field … I am also assigned as the creator of the note …

posts.author: nmalexandersen (Nils Morten Alexandersen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello All

When a Monday.com Form is been used to submit data into a board, for some reason … I am assigned as Creator … Also If the Form includes notes I the Update field … I am also assigned as the creator of the note …

Any way to avoid this ? I have not created the entry, or the update

Regards Nils
